sessions.Reflections:
I am Barian the Broken.

Date: 28.07.2025

Notes:

My Story:
Battle tested soldier from a noble house in decline. Disciplined and calculating; has a younger brother, Orin,
 whose reckless brilliance at Tharis Academy fascinated me even as I warned him. Hoping to revive our house, I quietly 
encouraged his foolishness until an unknown magical surge obliterated him.

 The academy offered only vague hints of an altercation and returned a singed spellbook
my most prized possession. 

Grief stricken, I deserted my post and lost comrades to certain death.
 I now wander, studying Orin's notes, imposing discipline on spellcraft, and hunting the truth. 
Untested mages rouse my distrust; brilliance without discipline killed my brother.

About Me:
I keep fieldtrip notes on everything: enemy tactics, arcane glyphs, even rations. 
Calm under fire; sounds that make recruits duck barely raise my eyebrows.

Ideals:
Discipline and mastery: everything can be perfected through relentless practice. 

Redemption: I will atone for the deaths my desertion caused.

Bonds:
My brother's scorched spellbook rides at my hip.
 Every spell I master is a promise to his memory.

Flaws:
I test new spells on myself first; pain beats risking another life.

 I have no tolerance for reckless flamboyance and despise magical institutions that hid the truth of Orin's death. 
The loss instilled a deep need for control.
sessions.Dark Tower:
Session: Dark Tower

Date: 13.07.2025

Notes:

Started in the Black Forge -> Giant Hammer surrounded by a Lava lake.

The party is high up in a hideout, they go towards the market and meet me there
We talk about the dwarfs that have ensalved the gnomes in this place (20000 gnome : 2000 Dwarfs)
There is a Balk Dragon, Calagror, in the lava lake, that might help us free the gnomes. 

I am looking for a tome, that was mentioned in my brothers journal, they agree to help in exchange for my services later on.
Party: 
Gnome Bard 
Elven Ranger
Me

The way is blocked by a necrotic barrie, slowing spell and boarded up. Once we get to the cave we get to the cave we fight
off spiders and meet the colletoron aship in the acid lake. The collecor trades my a silver vessel with traces of all magc for
350 silver pieces. He can upgrade weapons for 100 souls.

In the tower we meet an Expiravit in a summoning ritual (summond by a lesser vampire) along with a Banshee and a
Graverobber. After killing them I touch the tome and have a vision of a true vampire killing my brother.
sessions.Gnome Rebellion:
Session: Gnome Rebellion

Date: 28.07.2025

Notes:

The tome charms me, frcing me to hold it and endure the visons. Our Bard countercharms me and orders me to destroy
the tome, which splinters into glass.

From the Altar a green smoke rises and a buch of unded walk up the staris. We kill them only by cancelling the altars magic
with our Paladin. I almost loose my life in the process.

After cleansing thetowe and surronding cave we feel a devine presence.

When we get back to the blackforge I trade my sliver challice for a 60% Mithril longsword, and we talk to the gnome price 
to make a plan. The plan entails us acting as a delegation of the Tharis family Lo (Paladid) which has been orderd to 
quickly percure Mithril swords for the upcomming battle against Vulve Thargan the Lich Master.Our gnome specialist
will convince thedwarfs to chain p all the gnomes to increase mithril harvesting to fufill the order.Then we will command
theBlack Drke to destroy all the remaining Dwarfs. 

The plan works, except for a handfull of gnomes that are held back by the dwarven commander and some battle ragers. 
we charge into combat and defeat them, narrowly escaping the dragons fire.

After the Dragon is done raging, we meet up with the freed gnomes and thei price that has died, suffering mortal wounds.
We can see that he as traded his soul for a devine favour.

Caragorn the Black drake assumes human form and thanks us forour service. We then find the Mithril containing
strongbox of the dwarfs and retrive 7 mithril bars along with my silver challice.

Form the mithril we each forge our equipment with the help of the freed gnomes. For me I remelt my longswort into a shorter
Broadsword, and make a shield from mithril, along with a chainmail chest.

I feel the the expeerience of this adventure push my mind and body onto new hights asi level up.
